name: Laboratorio MongoDB
postCreateCommand: wget -qO- https://www.mongodb.org/static/pgp/server-7.0.asc | sudo tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/server-7.0.asc && echo 'deb [ arch=amd64,arm64 ] https://repo.mongodb.org/apt/ubuntu jammy/mongodb-org/7.0 multiverse' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/mongodb-org-7.0.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mongodb-mongosh || true
postStartCommand: bash -c 'while ! mongosh --quiet --eval "1" > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && mongosh scripts/seed.js || true'
